HUMMINGBIRD FINANCE

Hummingbird Finance ($ HMNG) 

Roadmap

What's been happening since we launched in April 2021? See what has been achieved and see our new plans for 2024

Token Reflections

Hummingbird Finance contract is designed to apply 3% tax to every transaction: 1% to the marketing fund, 1% adds to liquidity and 1% in USDT rewards to holders

Auto Staking

Holders earn 1% passive rewards in USDT. Hold HMNG long-term to increase rewards.

Hummingbirds

Hummingbirds are birds native to the Americas and constitute the biological family Trochilidae. There are about 360 species. They occur from Alaska to Tierra del Fuego but the vast majority of the species are found in the tropics. They are small birds, most species measuring 7.5–13 cm (3–5 in) in length. The smallest extant hummingbird species is the 5 cm (2.0 in) bee hummingbird, which weighs less than 2.0 g (0.07 oz). The largest hummingbird species is the 23 cm (9.1 in) giant hummingbird, weighing 18–24 g (0.63–0.85 oz). They are specialized for feeding on nectar but all species also consume insects or spiders.

If you are in harmony with our desire to protect hummingbirds, we welcome your support. Use the “Donate” button below.

Telegram Defi Bot

Developed by Hummingbird Finance, RapidSwapBot is the simplest way to swap tokens on Ethereum and Binance Smartchain blockchains directly from Telegram!

  • All interactions are through Wallet Connect
  • Full Details

HMNG Multi-Network Wallet

  • Buy Crypto with FIAT or card
  • Designed to keep assets secure and easy to restore. Pin and biometrics
  • Automatically adds all your tokens on set up
  • Non-custodial, peer-to peer wallet
  • DOWNLOAD

NFT Launchpad

Our NFT launchpad, named Mint Magic, was created to support companies, sports celebrities, businesses and crypto projects launch their NFT collections.. 

We can help you build NFT utilities.
Learn more on our dedicated webpage

NFT Marketplace.

Buy and sell our NFTs in our purpose built marketplace. Follow updates on Twitter or Telegram for Airdops and promotions.

$HMNG is a low-tax token on BSC rewarding holders in $USDT Bep20. The total tax amount is 3%: -1% liquidity -1% marketing -1% USDT reward to holders

Partners

Find us on

News

  • 22nd September

    New Partnership with Rapid Swap Bot

    RapidSwapBot is the simplest way to swap tokens on Ethereum and Binance Smartchain blockchains directly from Telegram! The partnership makes buying crypto quick, safe and secure.

    Details

  • 28th September

    HEGG Listed on Coinstore

    We are excited to announce the $HEGG has been listed on Coinstore as part of our new partnership strategy. 

    Listing

  • HEGG Now Available on DigiFinex

    DigiFinex is a digital assets trading platform. HMNG won an opportunity for a free listing for our HEGG token with the help f the HMNG community

    Listing

  • HMNG Listing on hotbit.io

    Hotbit Known as the cryptocurrency trading platform that lists the world's greatest number of cryptocurrency projects, Hotbit provides various types of cryptocurrency. Hummingbird Finance $hmng is now on HOTBIT.

    Details

  • HMNG & HEGG Listing on CoinGecko.com

    CoinGecko provides a fundamental analysis of the crypto market. In addition to tracking price, volume and market capitalization, CoinGecko tracks community growth, open-source code development, major events and on-chain metrics. Hummingbird Finance $hmng is now on CoinGecko.

    Details

  • HMNG & HEGG Listing on Coinmarketcap

    Coinmarketcap provides a fundamental analysis of the crypto market. In addition to tracking price, volume and market capitalization. Hummingbird Finance $hmng and $HEGG are now on Coinmarketcap.

    Details

  • HMNG audited by TechRate and listed.

    TechRate is a company specialized on free smart contract audits, DeFi security and smart contract development. Hummingbird Finance $hmng project is audited by TechRate and listed.

    Details

  • HMNG Relaunch New Contract November 2023

Frequently Asked Questions

We can point to the most important criteria in any valid cryptocurrency which HMNG has:
• Liquidity locked
• Listed on cmc cg
• Soon to be re-audited
• Active team
• Exchange listing incoming
• No presale, fair launched

No, 1% of every transaction is distributed to current holders with USDT.

We launched on April 11th, 2021 with HMNG v1 and launched the new v2 smart contract November 8th 2023

About

Hummingbird Finance ($HMNG) is low tax reward token on BSC chain, With HMNG you don’t need to stake or add liquidity to the pool for reward tokens. Just hold and earn free USDT from every transaction 💰
